I'll analyze the contract carefully:

1. The canonical width is `max(4, NumDigits(value))` — minimum 4 digits, but never fewer digits than needed to represent the value.
2. Kind and value never change.
3. Canonicalizing an already-canonical id is a no-op.

**(a) Implementation:**

```dafny
function Canonicalize(x: Id): Id {
  Id(x.kind, x.value, if x.width < PAD then PAD else x.width)
}
```

Wait — re-reading: "the numeric value is left-zero-padded to a minimum of 4 digits. An id already at 4 or more digits is returned unchanged." So if `width >= 4`, return unchanged. If `width < 4`, pad to 4.

```dafny
function Canonicalize(x: Id): Id {
  if x.width >= PAD then x else Id(x.kind, x.value, PAD)
}
```

**(b) Lemma with ensures clauses:**

```dafny
lemma Spec(x: Id)
  requires Wellformed(x)
  ensures Canonicalize(x).kind == x.kind
  ensures Canonicalize(x).value == x.value
  ensures Canonicalize(x).width >= PAD
  ensures Canonicalize(x).width >= NumDigits(x.value)
  ensures x.width >= PAD ==> Canonicalize(x) == x
  ensures x.width < PAD ==> Canonicalize(x).width == PAD
  ensures Wellformed(Canonicalize(x))
  ensures Canonicalize(Canonicalize(x)) == Canonicalize(x)
{ }
```

Let me review each clause for completeness:

1. `kind` unchanged ✓
2. `value` unchanged ✓  
3. Width at least 4 (minimum) ✓
4. Width sufficient to display value (wellformedness) ✓
5. Already canonical (width ≥ 4) → no-op ✓
6. Not canonical (width < 4) → width becomes exactly 4 ✓
7. Result is wellformed ✓
8. Idempotent (canonicalizing canonical is no-op) ✓

The full answer:

```dafny
function Canonicalize(x: Id): Id {
  if x.width >= PAD then x else Id(x.kind, x.value, PAD)
}

lemma Spec(x: Id)
  requires Wellformed(x)
  ensures Canonicalize(x).kind == x.kind
  ensures Canonicalize(x).value == x.value
  ensures Canonicalize(x).width >= PAD
  ensures Canonicalize(x).width >= NumDigits(x.value)
  ensures x.width >= PAD ==> Canonicalize(x) == x
  ensures x.width < PAD ==> Canonicalize(x).width == PAD
  ensures Wellformed(Canonicalize(x))
  ensures Canonicalize(Canonicalize(x)) == Canonicalize(x)
{ }
```
